headline: Asia’s Largest Oil Buyers Running Low on Hormuz Alternatives
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Asia’s largest oil buyers have been able to lean on workarounds to limit the impact of more than seven weeks of war in the Persian Gulf, shielding not only their own economies but those of neighbors competing for cargoes. headline: How The Deutsche Telekom (XTRA:DTE) Narrative Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And Telecom Deals
summary: Deutsche Telekom’s model fair value has shifted to €38.28, compared with a previous level of €38.14. This provides a fresh reference point for where analysts see the share price over the longer term. The updated fair value comes alongside a mix of target hikes and trims from banks such as Erste Group and JPMorgan, reflecting how different firms are weighing upside potential against valuation questions. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these moving targets and track the evolving...

headline: JPMorgan Brokerage Unit Recruits $1.1 Billion Advisor From William Blair
summary: BEST PRACTICES The brokerage unit of JPMorgan Chase’s wealth management business hired a financial advisor who managed $1.1 billion in client assets at rival William Blair. David Amar joined J.P. Morgan Advisors in Los Angeles where he serves high-net-worth and ultrahigh-net-worth individuals and institutional clients, according to the company.

content.title: JPMorgan Brokerage Unit Recruits $1.1 Billion Advisor From William Blair
content.summary: BEST PRACTICES The brokerage unit of JPMorgan Chase’s wealth management business hired a financial advisor who managed $1.1 billion in client assets at rival William Blair. David Amar joined J.P. Morgan Advisors in Los Angeles where he serves high-net-worth and ultrahigh-net-worth individuals and institutional clients, according to the company.

headline: How The YouGov (AIM:YOU) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Diverge
summary: YouGov’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from £4.43 to £3.65, while Street price targets around the stock have moved in different directions. With JPMorgan lifting its target by 10 GBp and two other firms trimming theirs by 20 GBp and 30 GBp, you are seeing a wider spread of opinions around what the shares are worth. Read on to see what this evolving narrative could mean for how you track the story from here. Stay updated as the Fair Value for YouGov shifts by adding it to your...
